values.name: fromRgb
values.comment: Convert RGB representation of a color to HCT.
values.type: { red : Basics.Float, green : Basics.Float, blue : Basics.Float, alpha : Basics.Float } -> { hue : Basics.Float, chroma : Basics.Float, tone : Basics.Float, alpha : Basics.Float }

values.name: toRgb
values.comment:
Convert HCT representation of a color in default viewing conditions to RGB.

  - **hue**: 0 <= hue < 360; invalid values are corrected.
  - **chroma**: 0 <= chroma < ?; Informally, colorfulness. The color returned
    may be lower than the requested chroma. Chroma has a different maximum for
    any given hue and tone.
  - **tone**: 0 <= tone <= 100; invalid values are corrected.
  - **alpha**: 0 <= alpha <= 1; invalid values are corrected.
values.type: { hue : Basics.Float, chroma : Basics.Float, tone : Basics.Float, alpha : Basics.Float } -> { red : Basics.Float, green : Basics.Float, blue : Basics.Float, alpha : Basics.Float }
